title: Vegan Creamy Rice Paella
description: A plant-based twist on the classic Spanish dish, using Peruvian rice and creamy sauce to create a rich and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the paella seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Peruvian rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the aerated water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Stir in the creamy sauce and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
